race.comment: ICARIAN DREAM (1) has been brought north again by the Ciaron Maher stable after one run back in Sydney, a close sixth over 1100m at Warwick Farm a month ago. Ran an excellent race the run prior in the 1400m Magic Millions Guineas. Should be winning if she can recapture that form. PINK VIXEN (5) was outclassed first-up at the Gold Coast then was more at home at Toowoomba last time when she got the cash in a 1300m BM70 against older horses. Carries less weight today after the claim so must be given due consideration. SMEXY (3) gets a pass mark for her sixth when resuming in an unsuitably short race at Eagle Farm. Goes well second-up and has been in the money at both runs over this distance. I'LLTELLYOUTONIGHT (9) came from a mile back to score over 1300m at the Gold Coast recently. Harder this time but cannot be ruled out. LONESOME SOUL (4) is a consistent filly with a good record here at this journey.
